response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack and systems software developer with 15+ years of experience, but the resume shows no evidence of the core requirements for this role: SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator or GPU architecture work, deep-learning workload analysis, or hardware-software co-design. The closest relevant experience is low-latency DLang services and brief C/C++ work at National Instruments, which falls well short of principal-level performance architecture for AI hardware.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience meeting the years-of-experience bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Some hardware-adjacent experience (embedded systems, robotic arms, NI LabWindows C/C++ components)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling or system-on-chip architecture experience
No deep-learning training/inference optimization or AI accelerator background
No GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or performance-architecture experience at the hardware level

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC/IP modeling and hardware architecture experience
No AI/deep-learning workload or accelerator expertise
Strong general software engineering and low-latency systems background
